text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I need you! The student council<n>is holding
a ballroom dance lesson, and<n>I'd like you to come
with me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You need a partner to join, but I could<n>never be
so bold as to ask another<n>Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Besides, what I want to see is the other<n>
Umamusume dancing together! Not me<n>pairing up
with them!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I won't be as nervous if you're my<n>partner. There's
no one else I can ask!<n>Please! Pleeeaaase!
